description: ANALYST proposes TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001: end-to-end smoke test of the autonomous multi-agent governance loop. Validates integrated operation of auditor-runner PRE_ACTION_APPROVED gate, current_task.json server-side write, dispatch role filter, CLOUD_CODE executor mutation, analyst-verifier-runner VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED path, and ledger writer chain. All events must carry schema_version v164. Proof target is governance/smoke_test_log.txt with timestamped committed entry plus complete four-event ledger trail referencing this task_id. This is the roadmap-valid next step after P3 infrastructure completion to confirm autonomous loop integrity before advancing to further roadmap phases.
